'''Motexx''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region on the other side of the [[Black Nebula/Legends|Black Nebula]] from [[Arat Fraca]].

==History==
Discovered during the [[Great Manifest Period/Legends|Great Manifest Period]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the planet was located in Republic-controlled space throughout the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a conflict between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="TEA" /> During this time, the region was patrolled by the [[Second Army|2nd Sector Army]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].<ref name="The Essential Guide to Warfare">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

Following the end of the war, Motexx became a planet of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. During Imperial reign, the [[Koqus liner]] ''[[Star Morning]]'', fully loaded with passengers, left Motexx for [[Gowdawl]], but never arrived. A year after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|battle]] over the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon]] of [[Endor (planet)/Legends|Endor]], the ship reappeared two [[Sector/Legends|sectors]] away, over [[Arat Fraca]]. After visiting several colony worlds, the ship returned to Motexx and headed to [[Vulvarch]].<ref name="SOL" />

==Inhabitants==
By [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], Motexx boasted a population of 500 million to 1 billion [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
